excluded.reason: No dark mode specified in the spec. Block inherits parent context but has no dark-specific styling.
Block is not a card. Only the tertiary button has interactive hover/focus states.

extra.description: Consecutive block styling: when two or more LinkWithDetails blocks are siblings, all blocks after the first must show border-top (1px charcoal), margin-top (32px), and padding-top (32px)
Button must always render as tertiary style with arrow icon. No variation selector should be available in the editor.
Only the tertiary button link is clickable, not the entire block wrapper
Headline renders as h3 with text-header-5 (Anton font, 24px)
Gap between headline, description, and button is 24px (gap-6)
Empty description should not render any wrapper element in the frontend
